messages.author: human
messages.text:
Let's have a new swarmforge setting for the swarmforge, applied to FES swarmforge:
Only 1 agent up which changes role as the parcel advances. Ie it is a specifier when the parcel starts. After it handsoff to the coder, then it stops, and then the coder statts, and so on.
Let's also have an intermittant coordinator, on a timer, just like the operator.
